scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail false --names 'next,peers,term,lan' --prefix-colors 'blue,cyan,magenta,green' --restart-tries 0 'tsx scripts/run-next-with-env.ts dev' 'tsx scripts/start-peer-services.ts' 'tsx scripts/terminal-pty-server.ts' 'tsx scripts/lan-port-proxy.ts'
scripts.predev: tsx scripts/run-action.ts sync_plugins && tsx scripts/health-check.ts && tsx scripts/ensure-peers-current.ts
scripts.build: env -u NODE_ENV -u TURBOPACK NODE_OPTIONS='--max-old-space-size=4096 --no-deprecation --disable-warning=ExperimentalWarning' next build --webpack
scripts.start: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail false --names 'next,peers,term,lan' --prefix-colors 'blue,cyan,magenta,green' --restart-tries 0 'tsx scripts/run-next-with-env.ts start' 'tsx scripts/start-peer-services.ts' 'tsx scripts/terminal-pty-server.ts' 'tsx scripts/lan-port-proxy.ts'
scripts.prestart: tsx scripts/run-action.ts sync_plugins && tsx scripts/health-check.ts && tsx scripts/ensure-peers-current.ts
scripts.verify: npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run test && DEVHUB_SKIP_NEXT_TYPECHECK=true npm run build
